description: Interpolates along a 3D shape or between two 3D points. Supports static and animated forms.
utility: Find a point at a ratio along a 3D shape or between two 3D points

arguments.name: shape or P1
arguments.description: Shape to interpolate along, or first point

arguments.name: ratio or P2
arguments.description: Ratio for shape form, or second point

arguments.name: ratio / toRatio
arguments.description: For point-to-point: the ratio. For animated: the ending ratio

alternates.description: Point at ratio along a 3D shape
Point at ratio between two 3D points
Point at (u, v) ratios on a paraplot3d surface. uRatio and vRatio are 0-1 fractions of each parameter range.

examples.expression:
A = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 6, 4, 2)
M = interpolate3d(G, A, B, 0.5)

examples.scenario: Corner point on a parametric surface
examples.expression:
dvOuter = paraplot3d(G, "r*sin(u)*cos(v)", "r*sin(u)*sin(v)", "r*cos(u)", range(pi/4, pi/4+pi/8), range(pi/2, pi/2+pi/6), c(dodgerblue), fc(dodgerblue), fo(0.95))
pCornerA = interpolate3d(G, dvOuter, 0, 0, type(surface))
pCornerB = interpolate3d(G, dvOuter, 1, 0, type(surface))

examples.scenario: Point at arbitrary location on a surface patch
